diffs.diff:
--- a/test_pi0_pipeline.py
+++ b/test_pi0_pipeline.py
@@ -0,0 +1,167 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python

+"""Test Pi0 pipeline end-to-end with dummy data."""

+import os

+os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'

+os.environ['MUJOCO_GL'] = 'egl'

+

+import torch

+import numpy as np

+import json

+import inspect

+

+print('=== Loading Pi0 ===')

+from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy

+from lerobot.policies.factory import make_pre_post_processors

+

+device = torch.device('cuda:0')

+policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained('lerobot/pi0_base')

+policy = policy.to(device)

+policy.eval()

+

+print(f'Policy config:')

+print(f'  input_features: {policy.config.input_features}')

+print(f'  output_features: {policy.config.output_features}')

+print(f'  n_action_steps: {policy.config.n_action_steps}')

+print(f'  max_state_dim: {policy.config.max_state_dim}')

+print(f'  max_action_dim: {policy.config.max_action_dim}')

+

+# Check all config attributes

+print(f'\n=== Full config ===')

+for attr in sorted(dir(policy.config)):

+    if not attr.startswith('_'):

+        val = getattr(policy.config, attr)

+        if not callable(val):

+            print(f'  {attr}: {val}')

+

+print(f'\n=== Loading preprocessor ===')

+preprocess, postprocess = make_pre_post_processors(

+    policy.config,

+    'lerobot/pi0_base',

+    preprocessor_overrides={'device_processor': {'device': str(device)}},

+)

+print(f'Preprocessor type: {type(preprocess)}')

+print(f'Postprocessor type: {type(postprocess)}')

+

+# Inspect preprocessor

+if hasattr(preprocess, 'processors'):

+    for p in preprocess.processors:

+        print(f'  Processor: {type(p).__name__}')

+        if hasattr(p, '__call__'):

+            sig = inspect.signature(p.__call__)

+            print(f'    __call__ sig: {sig}')

+

+# Inspect postprocessor

+if hasattr(postprocess, 'processors'):

+    for p in postprocess.processors:

+        print(f'  Postprocessor: {type(p).__name__}')

+

+print(f'\n=== Test forward pass ===')

+# Create dummy batch matching Pi0 expected format

+batch = {}

+batch['observation.images.base_0_rgb'] = torch.rand(1, 3, 224, 224, device=device)

+batch['observation.images.left_wrist_0_rgb'] = torch.rand(1, 3, 224, 224, device=device)

+batch['observation.images.right_wrist_0_rgb'] = torch.rand(1, 3, 224, 224, device=device)

+batch['observation.state'] = torch.zeros(1, 32, device=device)

+

+# Try preprocessor

+print('\nTrying preprocessor...')

+try:

+    complementary = {'task': 'pick up the red cup'}

+    processed = preprocess(batch, complementary_data=complementary)

+    print(f'Preprocessed keys: {list(processed.keys())}')

+    for k, v in processed.items():

+        if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor):

+            print(f'  {k}: shape={v.shape}, dtype={v.dtype}, device={v.device}')

+        else:

+            print(f'  {k}: type={type(v)}, val={v}')

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Preprocessor error: {e}')

+    import traceback

+    traceback.print_exc()

+    

+    # Try without preprocessor - manual tokenization

+    print('\nTrying manual tokenization...')

+    try:

+        from transformers import AutoTokenizer

+        tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained('google/paligemma-3b-pt-224')

+        tokens = tokenizer('pick up the red cup', return_tensors='pt', padding='max_length', max_length=64)

+        batch['observation.language.tokens'] = tokens['input_ids'].to(device)

+        batch['observation.language.attention_mask'] = tokens['attention_mask'].to(device)

+        print(f'Token shape: {tokens["input_ids"].shape}')

+        print(f'Attention mask shape: {tokens["attention_mask"].shape}')

+    except Exception as e2:

+        print(f'Manual tokenization error: {e2}')

+        import traceback

+        traceback.print_exc()

+

+print('\n=== Test predict_action_chunk ===')

+try:

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        if 'observation.language.tokens' not in batch:

+            # Try to get tokens from preprocessor output

+            if 'processed' in dir() and processed is not None:

+                batch_for_pred = processed

+            else:

+                raise ValueError('No tokens available')

+        else:

+            batch_for_pred = batch

+        

+        actions = policy.predict_action_chunk(batch_for_pred)

+        print(f'Action chunk shape: {actions.shape}')

+        print(f'Action chunk dtype: {actions.dtype}')

+        print(f'Action chunk device: {actions.device}')

+        print(f'Action chunk stats: min={actions.min().item():.4f}, max={actions.max().item():.4f}, mean={actions.mean().item():.4f}')

+        print(f'First action: {actions[0, 0, :10].cpu().numpy()}')

+        print(f'Action dim: {actions.shape[-1]}')

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'predict_action_chunk error: {e}')

+    import traceback

+    traceback.print_exc()

+

+print('\n=== Test select_action ===')

+try:

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        action = policy.select_action(batch_for_pred)

+        print(f'Select action shape: {action.shape}')

+        print(f'Select action: {action.cpu().numpy()}')

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'select_action error: {e}')

+    import traceback

+    traceback.print_exc()

+

+# Check what the postprocessor does

+print('\n=== Test postprocessor ===')

+try:

+    if 'actions' in dir():

+        post_actions = postprocess(actions)

+        print(f'Post-processed shape: {post_actions.shape if isinstance(post_actions, torch.Tensor) else type(post_actions)}')

+        if isinstance(post_actions, torch.Tensor):

+            print(f'Post-processed stats: min={post_actions.min().item():.4f}, max={post_actions.max().item():.4f}')

+            print(f'Post-processed first: {post_actions[0, 0, :10].cpu().numpy()}')

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Postprocessor error: {e}')

+    import traceback

+    traceback.print_exc()

+

+# Also check VLABench env observation format

+print('\n=== VLABench env test ===')

+try:

+    # Find how to load env

+    import VLABench

+    vlab_dir = os.path.dirname(VLABench.__file__)

+    tasks_init = os.path.join(vlab_dir, 'tasks', '__init__.py')

+    with open(tasks_init) as f:

+        content = f.read()

+    print(f'tasks/__init__.py (first 2000 chars):')

+    print(content[:2000])

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Error: {e}')

+

+# Check evaluator source more carefully

+print('\n=== Evaluator evaluate method ===')

+try:

+    from VLABench.evaluation.evaluator.base import Evaluator

+    src = inspect.getsource(Evaluator.evaluate)

+    print(src[:3000])

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Error: {e}')
